[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101011000 4
1 011011000 4
2 111011011 7
3 010111111 7
4 010111111 7
5 101101011 6
6 101101011 6
7 101101101 6

70 07 111111111 a
